title: Accept ADR and define source policy contracts
requirements: Use ADR-0018 after owner approval or update it before implementation.
Define privacy profiles pii_off, pii_guarded and pii_strict.
Set global PII default to pii_off.
Set external source defaults to pii_guarded.
Ensure pii_off disables PII detection, redaction, blocking and PII audit.
Keep secret scanning independent and always enabled.
Add source policy fields without forcing MemorySource and AnalyticsSource into one table.
